transcript:
[03:46:02 PM] AI Doctor: Hello! What brings you in today?
[03:46:13 PM] Patient: Regular checkup, and I want to update my cholesterol.
[03:46:15 PM] AI Doctor: Of course. Can you tell me your most recent cholesterol reading?
[03:46:27 PM] Patient: It was 170. Also my blood pressure was 122 over 78.
[03:46:40 PM] AI Doctor: Thank you. Any current medications or new symptoms?
[03:46:52 PM] Patient: I am on ibuprofen 400mg as needed. No new symptoms.
[03:47:05 PM] AI Doctor: Understood. I have everything I need. Let me update your chart now. [CONSULTATION_COMPLETE]
